title: Advances in Large Language Models for Academic Writing
abstract: This paper surveys recent advances in large language models (LLMs) applied to academic writing assistance, covering summarization, question generation, and citation recommendation.

title: Survey Question Generation from Scientific Literature
abstract: We propose a transformer-based approach to automatically generate survey questionnaire items from research papers, enabling rapid instrument development for social-science researchers.

title: Semantic Similarity Search with pgvector
abstract: pgvector enables efficient approximate nearest-neighbour search over high-dimensional embeddings inside PostgreSQL, making it suitable for RAG pipelines.

title: OpenAI text-embedding-3 Evaluation
abstract: A benchmark evaluation of OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small and text-embedding-3-large models on MTEB, showing strong multilingual performance.

title: Celery Task Queue Best Practices
abstract: This paper reviews best practices for distributed task queues with Celery, including queue isolation, retry strategies, and monitoring with Flower.

title: FastAPI for Scientific Backends
abstract: FastAPI's async-first design and automatic OpenAPI generation make it well-suited for data-intensive scientific web APIs.

title: Research Paper Version Control
abstract: We present a lightweight version-control scheme for academic manuscripts that differentiates auto-saves from manual checkpoints to reduce cognitive overhead.

title: Korean Academic NLP Resources
abstract: A curated list of NLP corpora and pre-trained models for Korean academic text, including abstracts from RISS and KISS databases.

title: Google OAuth Integration in Web Applications
abstract: A practical guide to integrating Google OAuth 2.0 with Next.js and FastAPI, covering token exchange, JWT validation, and refresh token management.

title: Claude API for Structured Text Generation
abstract: Anthropic's Claude API provides reliable structured outputs for long-form text generation tasks including summarization, rewriting, and question answering over scientific documents.
